title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI tool to pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama API; installable via PyPI.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model, packaged as a Docker image.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) example using Ollama embeddings and Chroma.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client written in Go that wraps the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset, exposing Ollama models as Generators & Embedders.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-gpt4all-ui
summary: Fork of GPT4All UI adapted to serve Ollama backends with model switching.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama API with async HTTP and std/json support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed client for Ollama with Tokio async runtime.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 6+ SDK for Ollama with both REST and gRPC variants; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that queries local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Python Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama completions into channels or DMs.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with GenServer-backed connection pooling.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app exposing Ollama models through admin-configurable REST endpoints.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server that lets any MCP client consume Ollama models.
